name: probis
description: AI-assisted prediction market trading system for Polymarket US.

scripts.dev: concurrently -n api,web -c blue,green "npm run dev --workspace @probis/api" "npm run dev --workspace @probis/web"
scripts.import:nba-history: node --input-type=module -e "import { importNbaHistory } from './apps/api/src/services/sports/nba-importer.js'; const result = await importNbaHistory({ startDate: process.env.START_DATE ?? '2023-10-24', endDate: process.env.END_DATE ?? new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10) }); console.log(JSON.stringify(result, null, 2));"
scripts.backtest:nba: node --input-type=module -e "import { runSportsBacktest } from './apps/api/src/services/sports/backtest.js'; const result = await runSportsBacktest({ league: 'NBA', startDate: process.env.START_DATE, endDate: process.env.END_DATE, minTrainingGames: Number.parseInt(process.env.MIN_TRAINING_GAMES ?? '10', 10) }); console.log(JSON.stringify(result, null, 2));"
